title: Long-Distance Hammer
setup: Your rook on **b2** is staring up an empty file with the back rank wide open at the other end.
hint: Climb to the 8th rank — the {{f7}}-{{g7}}-{{h7}} pawn shield seals the king's fate.
explanation:
## The Idea

A pure **back-rank mate** — the rook travels the length of the b-file and then turns the 8th rank into a kill zone.

Play {{Rb8#}}.

Why is the king stuck?

- {{f8}}, {{h8}} and every other 8th-rank square — all controlled by the rook on b8
- {{f7}}, {{g7}}, {{h7}} — all blocked by Black's own pawns
- The king cannot capture (b8 is far away) and there is nothing to interpose

> **Takeaway:** A rook far from the action can still deliver mate in one if the back rank is bare. Always scan for *long diagonals* (for bishops/queens) and *long files* (for rooks/queens) before moving.
